title: Chinatown I
content:
And a little farther
        the Fu Manchu mustache
        curved in mock epic proportions
        of a scimitar un-sheaved for action,
        perhaps the executioner's progress
        his victims entombed to their skulls
        in rolls of quivering earth - 
        the parting of the ways
        coming as your coin drops
        to the rasp of his
        tin cup chuckle.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Chinatown I"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
